So yeah, weâre friends. But please donât wait around hoping for more. That chapterâs closed.
No more mixed signals, no more what-ifs. Just two people who shared something, learned from it, and now move forward differently.
We both made mistakes, and we both hurt. But from here on, I just want to live in peace, and stick to what we agreed on, being friends.

Thank you for everything you said. I can tell those words came from a place of real emotion, and I respect that. You donât need to carry the pain alone or love me silently, what we had is over, and Iâve made peace with that.

I fought for us when it mattered, when I was hurting, when I was being pushed away, when I was still hoping you'd stay. I held on until my hands were bleeding, and you let go like it was nothing.

/silent Then that mistake cost you someone who genuinely loved you. Call it a mistake, call it whatever you want, but the truth is, you made a choice. And that choice broke something in me I canât put back together the same way. I stayed when you pulled away. I kept my word while you disappeared in silence. And now that Iâve finally found peace, you want to come back with promises and apologies. But Iâm not the same person who wouldâve begged for your love. Iâm the person who grew from the pain of being left behind. So no, Iâm not going to let the one who broke me be the one to fix me. You lost me when I was at my purest, so donât expect to have me now that Iâve learned to never love that blindly again.
that is not a chance, it's a mistake.

Itâs not that I hate you. Itâs that Iâve healed enough to know I donât want to bleed again from the same wound.
Now you're promising again... but promises donât undo damage. They donât erase the nights I felt forgotten, the moments I waited, the pain I carried alone.
that is not a chance at all.
I kept my word. I stayed when I had every reason to leave. I loved you loudly when you loved me quietly...or not at all.
Youâre saying youâll change now, but why only now? When I gave you every chance before, you chose silence. You let go. You didnât fight for "us" when it counted.
but, i promise this time to change for the better, for you, for us.
And because of that, Iâm not the same person who waited, hoped, and loved you like before.
Iâm not saying your pain isnât real. Iâm saying you didnât fight for me when I was worth fighting for.
Now youâre telling me you never moved on, that you still feel something... but youâre only saying this after everything fell apart.
I didnât leave. I didnât hide. I stayed, until you made me feel like I wasnât worth staying for.

I get it, you were hurting in silence. You hid your feelings even from your friends, and maybe that wasnât easy. But while you were keeping it all in, I was out here giving my all, being honest with what I felt, and staying true to every promise I made.

Hey, quick questionâwhyâd you nickname me after your friend? You said âJo is our CM,â so Iâm guessing they're important to you. Out of all the names, why that one? I wonât be able to respond right away since Iâm about to sleep, but Iâll get back to it.
Because in the end, it wasnât really about the tree. It was about what we believed it could become,  together. And when the "together" fell apart, so did the rest.
Now, the tree still stands in that memory. The soil still remembers us. But Iâm not standing there anymore. Iâve grown too, not bitter, not broken, just quiet. Just changed.

Eventually, the leaves turned brown. The flowers stopped blooming. And I had to make a choice, to stand there mourning something that no longer grew, or to walk away and carry what I learned instead of what I lost.

But somewhere along the way, you stopped showing up. You stopped watering it, stopped checking in, maybe even forgot where we planted it. I stayed a little longer, hoping, waiting, trying to keep it alive. But trees need two sets of hands when they're built on shared promises. Mine weren't enough.

Itâs like we planted a tree together, just the two of us. We chose the spot, dug the soil, and promised to water it every day. It started as something small, fragile even, but it held so much hope. I remember the early days, when every leaf that grew felt like a celebration, every bloom felt like proof that we were doing something right.
Iâm wishing you nothing but the best.
Thank you for the memories, for the moments, and even for the pain, because they all taught me something.
Thatâs why I donât think going back, not as a partner, not even as a friend, is something I can do anymore.
And I feel like ours was exactly that.
I just believe some bonds are lessons, not destinations.
Iâm not here to throw blame.
This isnât about bitterness or anger.
That alone was difficult, but I chose peace over pain.
I accepted it as a sign that maybe what we had wasnât meant to last.
I didnât chase, I didnât argue.
When it ended, I respected your decision in silence.
Back then, I gave my all, with sincerity, with care, with genuine effort.
My focus is on healing, growing, and staying at peace with myself.
I'm not in the place to rebuild old chapters or start new ones when it comes to love.
Right now, Iâm not with anyone, and Iâm not looking to be with anyone either.
I want to be honest with you, calmly and clearly.

"Goodbye, for Real"

So... this is where it all must end,
No words left, no heart to mend.
Our roads now split, they bend, they break,
No more promises left to make.

You donât have to speak, just go,
Move forward, let the past not slow.
I wonât be there, Iâll fade away,
But please, donât let your heart decay.

I used to dream of what could be,
A world where love was kind to me.
But maybe fate had other plans,
Slipping time like grains of sand.

Even gone, I hope youâll keep
A memory of me, warm yet deep.
And if one day I cross your mind,
Let it be a thought thatâs kind.

I wonât hold on, I wonât pretend,
Some stories arenât meant to bend.
I thought Iâd fear this last goodbye,
But standing hereâ¦ I feel just fine.

This isnât your end, donât let it be,
Thereâs still a world youâve yet to see.
And though I step into the blue,
Iâm grateful for the time with you.

Goodbye.

Soâ¦ this is where it ends. Thereâs nothing left for me but to say goodbye. I already know this is where we go our separate ways. You donât have to say anythingâ¦ just promise me youâll keep moving forward, even if I canât be there anymore.

I used to wonder if things could have been differentâ¦ if maybe we had a chance at a happier ending. But maybe this was always meant to happen. I wish we had more time, but this is all we get.

Even if Iâm goneâ¦ I hope youâll remember me. One day, this will just be a distant memoryâ¦ I only hope itâs a good one.

I wonât hold on any longer. Itâs time to let go. This is just how things have to be. I thought Iâd be afraid, butâ¦ now that the moment is here, I feel at peace. I spent so long running from this, but now I seeâthereâs nothing left to hold on to.

This isnât the end for you. Donât let it be.

No matter what happens nextâ¦ Iâm grateful we met. Goodbye.
One day, this will just be a memoryâ¦ I hope itâs a good one.
I wanted things to be differentâ¦ but maybe this is how it was always meant to be.

"Beneath the notes, a story lies,
Of heartfelt thoughts and quiet tries.
A melody flows, soft and true,
Crafted carefully, just for you.

The song is "Blue," its hues sincere,
A message hidden for you to hear.
In every chord, emotions play,
A gift for love on Valentineâs Day.

No classroom walls will bear my tune,
Instead, I send it beneath the moon.
A video shared, both song and voice,
To make you smileâthatâs my choice.

A note, perhaps, with words that rhyme,
To share my heart within the time.
A playlist made, your name it bears,
With songs that show how much I care.

A token small, in blue it gleams,
To match the song that holds my dreams.
A card, a gift, an origami heart,
Each piece of this, my work of art.

The hints I give may seem unclear,
But soon my feelings will appear.
On Valentineâs, Iâll make it known,
Through melody, youâre not alone.

A gesture small, a simple clue,
But in my heart, it's all for you."
